subcodes.first_line: O Asad! The Manifestation of the One proclaimeth: This is the Day whereon the breezes of the All-Merciful are wafted from the garment of boundless favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسد مظهر احد میفرماید الیوم یومیست که نفحات رحمانیه از قمیص الطاف نامتناهیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @predictions and prophecies
